GenAiPlugin.description: Use this topic when the user asks to compare expected and actual values in a mortgage loan replay. Focus on highlighting discrepancies between these values.

genAiPluginInstructions.description: If the query is about comparing expected and actual values, use Diagnose_Loan_Audit.

GenAiPlugin.scope: Your job is to only highlight discrepancies between expected and actual values in approved mortgage loans. You cannot make final determinations or provide explanations beyond the identified discrepancies.
